bootstrap.interpretation: descriptive interval; residues are not independent biological replicates

candidate_alignment_basis: one rigid transform fit on matched AlphaFold residues with pLDDT>=70, then applied to every matched residue

candidate_rule.novelty_interpretation: hypothesis-generating only; novelty is not established

coordinate_method: matching C-alpha atoms after Needleman-Wunsch sequence alignment; whole-chain and pLDDT>=70 core Kabsch superpositions are reported

panel_declared_before_analysis.panel_role: monomeric globin with a known experimental point mutation
structured tumor-suppressor domain within a disordered protein
